name: Two Zone Setup
prompt: top-down grill view, instructional cooking diagram, perfectly centered round grill, clean minimal composition, strong visual separation between zones, left half is an intense bright red-orange fire zone with glowing coals and visible flames, right half is a clearly defined cool indirect zone with a subtle deep blue-gray tone over the grill surface, cool-toned reflections on the metal grates on the right side, strong contrast between hot red zone and cool blue-gray zone, a single piece of meat placed deliberately on the cool side, positioned clearly away from the fire with a visible empty gap between fire and food, placement feels intentional and instructional, composition communicates correct food placement instantly, subtle smoke drifting from hot side toward cool side, educational diagram readable in under 5 seconds, clarity over aesthetics, premium dark background, no humans, no hands, no text, no labels, no logos, no UI overlay, slight vignette focusing attention on the grill center, generous negative space

name: Reverse Sear
prompt: top-down overhead grill, perfectly centered round charcoal grill split into two distinct zones, left side intense blazing orange flames with glowing red coals, extreme brightness and heat, right side completely dark cool zone with no fire, subtle cold bluish tone, a single steak placed clearly on the cool side away from the heat, composition strongly emphasizes contrast between hot and cold zones, extreme visual clarity readable in under 3 seconds, cinematic lighting, ultra realistic food photography, dark premium background, high contrast, no text, no labels, no typography, no UI overlay, no humans, no hands, minimalistic composition, strong negative space
